Featured Crops

Wheat (Rabi)

Requires cool growing season and bright sunshine at the time of ripening.

Learn More

Rice (Kharif)

Thrives in high temperatures and high humidity with heavy rainfall.

Learn More

Sugarcane (Cash Crop)

Grows well in hot and humid climates with a long growing season.

Learn More

What Farmers Say

"The area-wise statistics helped me understand what crops are trending in my district. Switched to Sugarcane this year and the yield was amazing!"

— Ramesh Patil, Maharashtra

"Having weather updates and fertilizer guides in one place saves me so much time. Highly recommend this system to agriculture students and farmers."

— Sunita Devi, Punjab

Frequently Asked Questions

How accurate are the area-wise statistics?

Our database is updated regularly by local agricultural extension workers to ensure that crop yields and cultivated land data are as accurate as possible for each village.

Is the weather data real-time?

Yes, the weather module uses live API integrations to fetch current temperature, humidity, and rainfall predictions for your exact location.

Can I apply for government schemes through this website?

While you cannot apply directly through our portal, we provide complete eligibility criteria and direct official links to government websites for application.
